svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="WdLmlmQcixKolKTrMWd-"> <mxGraphModel dx="1780" dy="928" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 12
skinparam state {
 BackgroundColor #EAF4FB
 BorderColor #2E75B6
 StartColor #1F4E79
 EndColor #1E7145
 FontSize 12
 ArrowColor #1F4E79
}
skinparam ArrowColor #1F4E79
skinparam note {
 BackgroundColor #FFFDE7
 BorderColor #F9A825
}

title State Diagram — Parallel Web Crawler Lifecycle

[*] --> READY : App launches

state READY : All settings at default.\nNo crawl in progress.

READY --> CONFIGURING : User edits any setting
CONFIGURING --> READY : Settings saved / confirmed

READY --> CRAWLING : User clicks START

state CRAWLING {

 state \"SEQUENTIAL MODE\n(threadCount = 1)\" as SEQ {
 [*] --> SEQ_FETCH
 SEQ_FETCH : HTTP GET (one at a time)
 SEQ_FETCH --> SEQ_STORE : Page fetched
 SEQ_STORE : Save to CSV/JSON/SQLite
 SEQ_STORE --> SEQ_FETCH : Next URL from queue
 }

 state \"PARALLEL MODE\n(threadCount = N)\" as PAR {
 [*] --> DISCOVERING
 DISCOVERING : Drain batch from BlockingQueue

 DISCOVERING --> FETCHING : Batch ready
 FETCHING : N threads fetching simultaneously

 state FETCHING {
 [*] --> HTTP_REQUEST
 HTTP_REQUEST --> PARSING : 200 OK
 HTTP_REQUEST --> RETRYING : IOException
 RETRYING --> HTTP_REQUEST : attempt < MAX_RETRIES
 RETRYING --> ERROR_PAGE : attempt >= MAX_RETRIES
 PARSING : Extract title, desc, links
 PARSING --> LINK_QUEUE : Links found
 LINK_QUEUE : Add new URLs to BlockingQueue
 }

 FETCHING --> STORING : All futures resolved
 STORING : synchronized CSV + JSON + SQLite
 STORING --> DISCOVERING : Next batch
 }

 note right of PAR
 Default mode.
 Achieves 3-5x speedup
 vs SEQUENTIAL mode.
 end note

 note left of SEQ
 Used ONLY for
 benchmark comparison.
 Set threadCount=1.
 end note
}

CRAWLING --> STOPPING : User clicks STOP\n(stopped.set(true))
CRAWLING --> BENCHMARK_SEQ : Benchmark Mode ON\n(runs seq first)
CRAWLING --> DONE : maxPages reached\nOR queue empty

BENCHMARK_SEQ : Running sequential pass\nRecording T_sequential
BENCHMARK_SEQ --> BENCHMARK_PAR : Sequential done

BENCHMARK_PAR : Running parallel pass\nRecording T_parallel
BENCHMARK_PAR --> SPEEDUP_DISPLAY : Parallel done

SPEEDUP_DISPLAY : Calculate Speedup = T_seq / T_par\nDisplay in GUI
SPEEDUP_DISPLAY --> DONE : Benchmark complete

STOPPING --> DONE : executor.shutdownNow()\n+ finalize storage

state DONE : All results saved.\nStats finalized.\nSpeedup shown (if benchmark).

DONE --> READY : User clicks CLEAR
DONE --> CRAWLING : User clicks START\n(new session)

[*] -[hidden]-> READY
@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="HDwSmDTa_OjxVkMHbnbk-9"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1553" width="1383" x="160" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
